title: LLM Command Center
description: Tier 1 System Command Center — golden signals, cost, sessions, token flow, cache efficiency, session drill-down table, and live error/session feeds. The single pane of glass for AI agent health.

panels.title: Throughput
panels.description: Messages processed per minute over the last 5 minutes.

panels.title: Error Rate %
panels.description: Message error rate. <1% green, 1-5% yellow, >5% red.

panels.title: P95 LLM Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile LLM call duration. <2s green, 2-5s yellow, >5s red.

panels.title: Active Sessions
panels.description: Currently active agent sessions.

panels.title: Daily Cost
panels.description: Today's accumulated spend. Green <$3, yellow <$5, red >$5.

panels.title: Issues
panels.description: Count of stuck sessions + active tool loops. 0 = healthy.

panels.title: Burn Rate
panels.description: Current spending velocity projected to hourly rate.

panels.title: Today's Tokens
panels.description: Total tokens consumed today across all models.

panels.title: Avg Response
panels.description: Average LLM response time over the last 5 minutes.

panels.title: Cache Hit %
panels.description: Current cache hit ratio. Higher is better — more tokens served from cache means lower cost.

panels.title: Model Mix
panels.description: Token consumption distribution across models over the selected range.

panels.title: Request Rate + Errors
panels.description: Message rate by outcome (stacked bars) with error rate line overlay.

panels.title: LLM Latency (p50/p95/p99)
panels.description: LLM call duration percentiles from gen_ai standard metrics.

panels.title: Cost Rate by Model + Queue
panels.description: Dual-axis: cost rate by model (stacked bars $/hr, left) + queue depth (line, right).

panels.title: Token Flow (stacked area)
panels.description: Input, output, and cache_read token rates filtered by provider/model.

panels.title: Cache Efficiency (dual-axis)
panels.description: Cache hit ratio % (area, left) + cache savings $ (line, right).

panels.title: Sessions / 1h
panels.description: Unique sessions seen in a 1-hour sliding window.

panels.title: Avg $/Session
panels.description: Average cost per completed session over the selected range.

panels.title: Message Rate
panels.description: Messages per minute by outcome — shows when the agent is busy and when errors cluster.

panels.title: Recent Sessions
panels.description: Session usage summaries — click Session ID to drill down into Session Explorer. Sorted by time descending.

panels.title: Errors & Warnings
panels.description: Error and warning logs from the agent. Click a log line to view the correlated trace in Tempo.

panels.title: Live Activity Feed
panels.description: Real-time stream of all agent activity — user messages, LLM calls, tool executions, assistant responses. Inspired by openclaw-dashboard live feed.

targets.expr: {service_name="openclaw"} | component="lifecycle" | event_name=~"message\\.(received|sent)|tool\\.call|llm\\.(input|output)" | line_format "{{ if eq .event_name \"message.received\" }}[USER] {{ .openclaw_from }}{{ if .openclaw_content }}: {{ .openclaw_content }}{{ end }}{{ else if eq .event_name \"llm.input\" }}[LLM] {{ .openclaw_model }}{{ else if eq .event_name \"llm.output\" }}[LLM] {{ .openclaw_model }} {{ .openclaw_duration_s }}s {{ .openclaw_tokens_output }}tok{{ else if eq .event_name \"tool.call\" }}[TOOL] {{ .gen_ai_tool_name }}{{ if .tool_error }} ERR{{ end }}{{ else if eq .event_name \"message.sent\" }}[SENT] {{ .openclaw_to }}{{ end }}"

panels.title: Recent Session Summaries
panels.description: Session usage summaries with trace correlation. Click to view the full session trace.

panels.title: LLM Latency by Model
panels.description: P95 LLM call duration per model from gen_ai standard metrics. Identifies which models are slowest.

panels.title: Message Type Breakdown
panels.description: Message type flow: user, assistant, tool_call, tool_result, error. Shows conversation dynamics.

panels.title: Slowest LLM Calls
panels.description:
Top 10 slowest LLM calls from Tempo traces. Click to drill into the full trace hierarchy.

Requires Tempo search. If empty, check Tempo config or click trace_id links in log panels.

panels.title: LLM Operation Distribution
panels.description: Breakdown of gen_ai operations: chat (LLM calls), execute_tool (tool calls), invoke_agent (sessions).
